npz_variables.flow_value_musd: Aggregated retained trade value in million current USD, shape (K,m,n,L).
npz_variables.flow_quantity_ton: Aggregated retained trade quantity in tonnes where available, shape (K,m,n,L).
npz_variables.exporter_codes: BACI exporter country codes retained in the instance.
npz_variables.importer_codes: BACI importer country codes retained in the instance.
npz_variables.exporter_names: Short exporter labels when country metadata are available.
npz_variables.importer_names: Short importer labels when country metadata are available.
npz_variables.sector_names: Commodity-sector labels. Year-level NPZ files are stored in the canonical order: Machinery, Minerals, Chemicals, Transport, Metals.
npz_variables.supply_cap: Exporter-wise capacity vector defining the feasible set C.
npz_variables.demand_total: Importer-wise observed demand totals in normalized units.
npz_variables.p_price: Demand-price scale parameters calibrated from observed active-route average costs, shape (K,n).
npz_variables.normalization_scale_musd: Maximum retained flow value used for normalization.

vi_formulation: Find x* in C such that <F(x*), x-x*> >= 0 for all x in C.
reference_solution: No x_ref is stored in v0.3; approximate references can be computed by running included solvers to a tight residual tolerance.
